title: tovariaceae
intro: The Tovariaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a group of flowering plants that are primarily native to Central and South America, and are characterized by their unique combinations of morphological and anatomical features. The Tovariaceae family consists of approximately 10-15 species of plants, which are often shrubs or vines with distinctive leaves and inflorescences. These plants are often found in tropical and subtropical regions, and are of interest to botanists and horticulturists due to their diversity and adaptability.
